overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a video game showing a nighttime walk along a dirt path. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing tall grass, a stone wall on the right, and a dark tree line ahead under a clear night sky.

dark silhouette of distant trees against the night sky

segments.scene_description: A continuous first-person walk along a dark dirt path at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The path is bordered by a stone wall on the right and tall grass on both sides, leading toward a distant tree line under a clear night sky. No other characters or significant events occur during the steady forward movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desolate dirt path that leads deeper into a dark, nocturnal wilderness. It begins with a steady forward movement, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to reveal a narrow trail bordered by tall grass. As the camera advances, the beam of light tracks along a weathered stone wall on the right, maintaining a constant pace through the stillness of the night. The scene then opens up as the path stretches further toward a dense, looming tree line under the expanse of a clear night sky.
